author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Step 1 of Phase 1. Implementing foundation types per .design/phase-1-autograd-engine.md Architecture section. Files: Cargo.toml (workspace root), ferrotorch-core/Cargo.toml, ferrotorch-core/src/lib.rs, tensor.rs, storage.rs, device.rs, dtype.rs, error.rs. Key decisions: dynamic shapes (Vec<usize>), own-the-buffer storage, Mutex for grad field, Device enum with Cpu+Cuda variants.
